title: Why Skills Outlive Models
subtitle: From Prompt Engineering to Reusable Agent Capabilities
summary: While AI models constantly evolve, the lasting competitive advantage lies in developing structured Agent Skills: reusable capability modules that embed domain knowledge, best practices, and organizational standards.
body: Models will keep changing. That makes model-specific prompting a weak foundation for enterprise capability. The more durable asset is the knowledge a team packages around the model: standards, domain context, review habits, and repeatable workflows.
Agent skills turn that knowledge into reusable operating material. They help teams move from one-off prompting toward capabilities that can be versioned, improved, and taught across an organization.

For leaders, this matters because the advantage is not just access to a stronger model. It is the ability to encode engineering judgment so teams can use AI in a way that remains consistent as the tooling evolves.
